description_long: This shrub features a dense cluster of broad, jagged-edged green leaves radiating from several upright and arching stems. The leaves are arranged in a somewhat irregular pattern, giving the plant a lush and full appearance. Each leaf is elongated with sharply serrated margins, contributing to a spiky visual texture. The stems are slender and dark, emerging from a central base and supporting the foliage at varying heights and angles. There are no visible flowers or fruit, and the plant appears to be well-suited for decorative use in urban landscapes such as parks or sidewalk planters. The overall form is compact and low to the ground, making it ideal for ground cover or border planting.
description: A compact, dense shrub with jagged-edged green leaves on slender, arching stems. Its spiky foliage and irregular arrangement create a lush, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: The shrub displays a full, rounded profile with overlapping jagged leaves and visible central stems.
description_view_1: This view highlights the horizontal spread of the leaves and the arching nature of the stems.
description_view_2: The shrub appears slightly flatter, with the leaves radiating outward and the central base more visible.
description_view_3: The dense layering of leaves is prominent, with some leaves partially obscuring others and a clear view of the spiky edges.
